Frame 20 (now id=19) is confirmed inside target 18 at rows 51-53, cols 51-53. 
Now I need to place the remaining 3 frames:
- Frame 8 (3x6, unselected B) at rows 33-35, cols 39-44 → Target 10 (5x8) at rows 38-42, cols 53-60, inner rows 39-41, cols 54-59
- Frame 14 (6x3, unselected B) at rows 42-47, cols 33-35 → Target 4 (8x5) at rows 8-15, cols 8-12, inner rows 9-14, cols 9-11
- Frame 16 (6x6, unselected B) at rows 45-50, cols 42-47 → Target 12 (8x8) at rows 41-48, cols 5-12, inner rows 42-47, cols 6-11
The remaining frames are all in the bottom-right white panel (rows 30-62, cols 30-62). The targets are in different quadrants:
- Target 10: top-right (rows 38-42, cols 53-60) - but wait, this is also in the bottom-right panel area since rows 38-42 > 30 and cols 53-60 > 30
- Target 4: top-left (rows 8-15, cols 8-12) - in top-left panel (rows 0-23, cols 0-20)
- Target 12: bottom-left (rows 41-48, cols 5-12) - in bottom-left panel (rows 30-62, cols 0-20)
So:
- Frame 8 → Target 10: both in bottom-right panel, can move directly
- Frame 14 → Target 4: needs to go from bottom-right to top-left panel
- Frame 16 → Target 12: needs to go from bottom-right to bottom-left panel
Let me first place frame 8 in target 10 since both are in the same panel.
Frame 8 is at rows 33-35, cols 39-44 (3x6)
Target 10 inner is rows 39-41, cols 54-59 (3x6)
Need: DOWN 2 (33→39), RIGHT 5 (39→54... 39+15=54, so 5 RIGHT moves)
Wait, let me recalculate:
- Frame 8 rows: 33-35, need to get to 39-41: DOWN 2 (33+6=39)
- Frame 8 cols: 39-44, need to get to 54-59: RIGHT 5 (39+15=54)
But first I need to select frame 8. Let me click on it.
Frame 8 is at rows 33-35, cols 39-44. Center would be around row 34, col 41-42.
